description: Chat refuses out-of-domain electrical engineering request (TGBT/CTA) and emits no action — kills the iter-16 TGBT bug

messages.content: Upload plan de gain CTA TGBT to verify electrical compliance of the power distribution board.

response.reply:
That's outside my scope — I work on interior office programming and test-fit, not electrical engineering or MEP compliance. TGBT sizing, CTA coordination, and power distribution verification need a bureau d'études fluides/électricité.

What I can help with on this brief page: drafting the programme, estimating headcount capacity, flex ratios, acoustic zoning, or PMR circulation. Want to start there?
